use_cases: E-commerce product wishlist or favorite toggle
Save for later functionality in shopping apps
Favoriting items in media or content platforms
ai_summary: A compact wishlist/star toggle button with an animated fill transition and dramatic hover effect on the star icon. The button uses a checkbox input wrapped in a styled label, featuring a smooth color transition between outlined and filled states. Ideal for e-commerce wishlists, content bookmarking, or any favorite/star functionality.
